features.title: Distributed State Stability

Projects.title: System Deployments
Projects.meta_description: Exploring distributed architectures, container-aligned dev-flows, and enterprise Next.js patterns.

items.title: Project Starlight: Planetary Logistics Core
items.description: Ground-up modernization of a distributed booking and tracking engine.
items.desc:
Technical Directive: Rebuilding a mission-critical core from legacy monolith to distributed Next.js. I led the cross-functional squad (20+ devs) across 3 workstreams.

  • Lead of Leads: Defined the governance for tech selection and environment standardization.
  • Observability: Implemented Trace-ID Context Propagation across the ELK stack for sub-second incident root-cause analysis.
  • Resiliency: Solved Cache Pollution issues via centralized Redis state management.

items.title: Quantum Mesh: Edge Content Delivery
items.description: High-velocity content hub for global data distribution.
items.desc:
Objective: Deliver content to millions of edge nodes with near-zero latency.

  • Caching Strategy: Combined Next.js ISR with global CDN layers and localized browser persistence.
  • System decoupling: Used a Headless approach to allow real-time updates without infrastructure redeployment.

jobs.title: Senior Engineering Specialist (Lead of Leads)
jobs.description:
Led digital transformation for high-scale enterprise logistics hubs.

• Team Orchestration: Scaled engineering capacity from 4 to 20+ members across multiple workstreams.
• Infrastructure Alignment: Enforced Docker-native development to eliminate local-to-production variance.
• State Resilience: Architected Redis-backed persistence for high-concurrency multi-pod K8s clusters.

jobs.title: Technical Lead
jobs.description:
Architected foundational cores for high-traffic promotional engines.

• Next.js Core: Built resilient frontend foundations handling 15x traffic surges.
• Edge Caching: Implemented triple-layer caching strategies for instant content delivery.

jobs.title: Strategic Research Sabbatical
